description_long: This is a large, detached bungalow set within a fenced plot, surrounded by lush landscaping and mature trees. The building features a low-pitched, gable roof with multiple chimneys and a mix of large and small rectangular windows distributed across its facades. The front of the bungalow includes a driveway leading to a double garage, with a paved path and manicured hedges framing the entrance. The rear of the property reveals a spacious backyard with a patio area, garden beds, and outdoor seating, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a light-colored material, possibly stucco or painted brick, with contrasting trim around the windows and doors. The overall design is balanced and symmetrical, with clear separation between the main living area and the garage wing.
description: A spacious, light-colored bungalow with a gable roof, double garage, and landscaped garden, surrounded by a fence and mature trees. The design is symmetrical with large windows and a prominent driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, driveway, main entrance, and symmetrical landscaping with hedges and trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, patio area, garden beds, and outdoor seating, with the garage less visible.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the main facade with large windows, front garden, and the entrance pathway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage wing, side garden, and additional trees along the property boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
